zh.lifeSummary: 當Hodierne de Courtenay於1062年出生在法國崔洛易特庫尼時，她的父親Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay28歲，母親Elisabeth Montlhéry22歲。她和Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1110年在法國哈帕格享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hodierne de Courtenay于1062年出生在法国崔洛易特庫尼时，她的父亲Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay28岁，母亲Elisabeth Montlhéry22岁。她和Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1110年在法国哈帕格享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

en.lifeSummary: When Hodierne de Courtenay was born in 1062, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, her father, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, was 28 and her mother, Elisabeth Montlhéry, was 22. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. She died in 1110, in Champagne, France, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hodierne de Courtenay est née en 1062, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Montlhéry, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. Elle est décédée en 1110, à Champagne, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hodierne de Courtenay 1062 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay 28 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth Montlhéry 22. Sie hatte mit Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1110 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Champagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hodierne de Courtenay è nata il nel 1062 nel Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth Montlhéry, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. Morì nel 1110, nel Champagne, Francia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hodierne de Courtenayが1062年にフランスセントアロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenayは28歳，母Elisabeth Montlhéryは22歳であった。彼女はGeoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joignyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1110年にフランスチャンプアグンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hodierne de Courtenay(이)가 1062년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth Montlhéry(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1110년 프랑스 챔파그니에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hodierne de Courtenay nasceu em 1062, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Montlhéry, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. Ela faleceu em 1110, em Champagne, França, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hodierne de Courtenay родилась в 1062 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Montlhéry, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. Она умерла в 1110 г. в местности чампагн, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hodierne de Courtenay nació en 1062, en Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Montlhéry, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny. Murió en 1110, en Champagne, Francia, a la edad de 48 años.
